title: Node Process, Event Loop, Modules, Configuration, and Lifecycle · Type-System Trace: Config Parse Validate Freeze
summary: The service reads configuration during requests, starts background promises without ownership, mixes module systems, treats signals as ordinary exceptions, and reports ready before dependencies exist. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts config parse validate freeze increment in process, event-loop, configuration, and lifecycle state model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Parse, validate, normalize, redact, and freeze configuration once before acquiring resources or accepting traffic.
Configure ESM, CommonJS interop, package exports, file extensions, and NodeNext resolution without relying on accidental development-loader behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
